# Sunday Morning Pancakes
- 200g All-purpose flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- A pinch of fine sea salt
- 1 tablespoon sugar (optional, but helps with browning)
- 240ml whole milk
- 1 large egg
- 50g melted butter (let it cool slightly so you don't scramble the egg)

Mix dry. Whisk wet. Combine gently—lumps are fine. Fry on medium heat until bubbles form on top, then flip. Best served with too much maple syrup.
